message:
franken_numpy-0vsz: add tostring alias + new polynomial functions

- Add tostring() as deprecated alias for tobytes_array() for NumPy parity
- Add polymulx() for polynomial * x multiplication (ascending order)
- Add polypow() for polynomial exponentiation via repeated convolution
- Add polytrim() for removing small trailing coefficients
- Add convolve_polys() helper for polynomial multiplication
- Add unit tests for all new polynomial functions (polyvander, polyvalfromroots, polyval2d, polyval3d, polymulx, polypow, polytrim)

Closes: br-franken_numpy-0vsz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
